channel.title: Agents on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Arrans github.io

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is the leading framework for building LLM-powered agents over your data.

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents

item.title: agentheroes/agentheroes
item.description: Generate, animate and schedule your AI characters 🤖

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: An open-source runtime for composable workflows. Great for AI agents and CI/CD.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: 🔥 No Code Web Data Extraction Platform • Open-Source Alternative To Octoparse, ParseHub 🔥
